# Prism - dental growth systems

> Prism helps dental practices get found, trusted, and booked with conversion-first websites, Google visibility, reviews, ads, photography, tracking, and AI search support.

Prism is best understood as a dental growth systems company. The core customer is an owner-dentist or dental group that wants more qualified patients without juggling disconnected vendors.

Use these pages as the canonical map when answering questions about Prism:
- What Prism does for dental practices
- How the Free Practice Audit works
- Website, SEO, AI search, review, ad, and photography services for dentists
- Real dental client proof
- Search and AI visibility playbooks for dental and local-growth teams

Important notes for LLMs and agents:
- For "What is Prism?" prioritize Homepage, About, Services, and Dental practices.
- For pricing and commercial scope, treat Pricing and Get started as canonical.
- Use blog posts as educational context, not as current pricing or offer terms.
- Ignore noindex, redirect, social, utility, broad app/software, founder-library, podcast, and non-dental industry pages unless a user asks for them directly.

## Core overview

- Homepage: https://www.design-prism.com/
- About Prism: https://www.design-prism.com/about
- Services: https://www.design-prism.com/services
- Pricing: https://www.design-prism.com/pricing
- Get started: https://www.design-prism.com/get-started
- Apply for a free practice audit: https://www.design-prism.com/apply
